info.name: Project Monthly Sheet API
info.description: Collection for testing Social Media project monthly sheet endpoints.

body.raw:
{
  "month": 7,
  "year": 2026,
  "totalReels": 20,
  "totalPosts": 15,
  "totalReelsUploaded": 18,
  "totalPostsUploaded": 12,
  "moodBoardLink": "https://example.com/moodboard",
  "days": [
    {
      "date": "2026-07-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "reelType": "SHOOT",
      "postType": "AI",
      "script": "Intro script for day 1",
      "description": "Post description for day 1"
    },
    {
      "date": "2026-07-02T00:00:00.000Z",
      "reelType": "AI",
      "postType": "SHOOT",
      "script": "Script for day 2",
      "description": "Post description for day 2"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create a new monthly sheet for a Social Media project. Allowed role: MANAGER assigned to this project.
Get all monthly sheets for the project. Allowed roles: ADMIN, HR, EA, assigned MANAGER.
Get a single monthly sheet by its ID. Allowed roles: ADMIN, HR, EA, assigned MANAGER.
Update the monthly sheet and its calendar days. Allowed role: assigned MANAGER.
